title: lobularia rupestris
intro: Lobularia rupestris, also known as Sweet Alyssum, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the mustard family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lobularia rupestris include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and acting as a natural insect repellent. Lobularia rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and homeopathic treatments.
